subject: Super Saiyan 3 Son Goku with extremely long flowing golden hair, dynamic mid-shot action pose
description: A Super Saiyan 3 fighter is shown in a mid-shot to wide action pose, with the distinctive extremely long flowing golden-yellow hair that extends well down the back — the defining visual marker of the SSJ3 transformation. His eyebrows are absent, consistent with the SSJ3 form. He wears an orange gi. The figure's body is turned slightly, one arm raised or extended in a power pose. The background is a blue sky gradient with motion streaks. A strong golden energy aura surrounds the figure. The foil variant card adds a sheen to the art but the content mirrors the standard version.
foreground: Super Saiyan 3 fighter with extremely long flowing golden hair in orange gi, golden aura
background: Blue sky gradient with golden energy effects
